sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49272" key="qugatrogo/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠγατρο-γόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n49272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">begetting</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing daughters</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:212" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.212</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
